sensitiveDataPolicy: synthetic data only; secrets, private paths, timestamps, and nondeterministic identifiers are forbidden
sizeBehavior: model-visible JSON is bounded by the kernel projection; raw tool output is excluded

payload.summary: plan rejected: hypothesis $HYPOTHESIS_ID_1 has no disproof path (set disproveBy)
payload.error: plan rejected: hypothesis $HYPOTHESIS_ID_1 has no disproof path (set disproveBy)
